---
name: Data error
about: ARG annotation, mechanism, or drug classification is incorrect
title: '[DATA] '
labels: data-quality
assignees: pranavathiyani
---

## What's wrong
Describe the data error — wrong mechanism, incorrect ARO accession, missing gene, etc.

## Gene / entity affected
- Gene name: e.g. `mecA`
- ARO accession: e.g. `ARO:3000616`
- Pathogen: e.g. *Staphylococcus aureus*

## Current value (incorrect)
What AMRscape currently shows.

## Correct value
What it should show, with source/reference.

## Source / evidence
Link to CARD, UniProt, or published paper supporting the correction.
